# Pull Request

## Summary

-

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to this repository's purpose.
- [ ] I updated both English and Turkish docs when user-facing docs changed.
- [ ] I did not add tokens, auth files, sessions, memories, cookies, private keys, private local paths, or machine-specific state.
- [ ] I did not add fake badges, fake metrics, private screenshots, or unlicensed media.
- [ ] I ran `npm run check`.
- [ ] I ran a secret scan when available.

## Verification

```text
npm run check
```

## Notes

Mention any manual GitHub settings, connector auth, or release actions that remain outside the repository.
